# fleetdm_host (Data Source)

Use this data source to get information about a FleetDM host. Look up by numeric `id` or by `identifier` (hostname, UUID, or serial number).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a host by ID
data "fleetdm_host" "by_id" {
  id = 42
}

# Look up a host by identifier (hostname, UUID, or serial number)
data "fleetdm_host" "by_serial" {
  identifier = "C02ABC123456"
}

# Output host information
output "host_details" {
  value = {
    hostname        = data.fleetdm_host.by_id.hostname
    display_name    = data.fleetdm_host.by_id.display_name
    platform        = data.fleetdm_host.by_id.platform
    os_version      = data.fleetdm_host.by_id.os_version
    hardware_serial = data.fleetdm_host.by_id.hardware_serial
    status          = data.fleetdm_host.by_id.status
    team_name       = data.fleetdm_host.by_id.team_name
    primary_ip      = data.fleetdm_host.by_id.primary_ip
    disk_available  = data.fleetdm_host.by_id.gigs_disk_space_available
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Host ID. Exactly one of `id` or `identifier` must be specified.
- `identifier` (String) Host identifier — can be hostname, UUID, or hardware serial number. Exactly one of `id` or `identifier` must be specified.

### Read-Only

- `build` (String) Host OS build string.
- `computer_name` (String) Host computer name.
- `cpu_brand` (String) Host CPU brand.
- `cpu_logical_cores` (Number) Number of logical CPU cores.
- `cpu_physical_cores` (Number) Number of physical CPU cores.
- `cpu_type` (String) Host CPU type.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `display_name` (String) Host display name.
- `gigs_disk_space_available` (Number) Available disk space in GB.
- `hardware_model` (String) Hardware model.
- `hardware_serial` (String) Hardware serial number.
- `hardware_vendor` (String) Hardware vendor name.
- `hostname` (String) Host hostname.
- `memory` (Number) Total memory in bytes.
- `os_version` (String) Host OS version string.
- `percent_disk_space_available` (Number) Percentage of disk space available.
- `platform` (String) Host platform (darwin, windows, ubuntu, etc.).
- `platform_like` (String) Host platform family.
- `primary_ip` (String) Primary IP address.
- `primary_mac` (String) Primary MAC address.
- `public_ip` (String) Public IP address.
- `seen_time` (String) Last seen timestamp.
- `status` (String) Host status (online, offline, mia, new).
- `team_id` (Number) Team ID the host belongs to.
- `team_name` (String) Team name the host belongs to.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `uuid` (String) Host UUID.
